items.content: Gout Gout has produced a breathtaking run to break 20 seconds in the 200 metres for the first time, and smash his own national record.

items.content: Gout Gout has claimed his second men’s 200m Australian title, and broken the under 20s world record, with a sizzling run in Sydney.
